title: firefly-iii values
description: Configurable Helm values for the firefly-iii chart.

replicaCount.description: Number of application pod replicas to run. Increase for horizontally scalable services when storage and application behavior allow multiple pods.

image.description: Container image settings for the main application container.

repository.description: Container image repository used for the main application container.

pullPolicy.description: Kubernetes image pull policy for the container.

tag.description: Container image tag to deploy. Pin this to a concrete version for repeatable installs and predictable upgrades.

imagePullSecrets.description: Optional list of image pull secrets used when the container image is stored in a private registry.

nameOverride.description: Override the chart name portion used when generating Kubernetes resource names.

fullnameOverride.description: Override the full generated Kubernetes resource name.

service.description: Kubernetes Service configuration for exposing the application inside the cluster.

type.description: Kubernetes Service type, such as ClusterIP, NodePort, or LoadBalancer.

port.description: Service port exposed inside the cluster.

targetPort.description: Container port or named port that receives traffic from the Service.

ingress.description: Kubernetes Ingress configuration for exposing the application through an ingress controller.

enabled.description: Whether to create an Ingress resource.

className.description: IngressClass name used by the target ingress controller.

annotations.description: Additional annotations applied to the Ingress resource.

hosts.description: Ingress host and path rules routed to the chart Service.

tls.description: TLS configuration for Ingress hosts and referenced certificate secrets.

httpRoute.description: Gateway API HTTPRoute configuration for exposing the application through a Gateway.

enabled.description: Whether to create a Gateway API HTTPRoute resource.

annotations.description: Additional annotations applied to the HTTPRoute resource.

parentRefs.description: Gateway parentRefs that attach this HTTPRoute to one or more Gateways.

rules.description: HTTPRoute routing rules, including path matches and filters.

items.description: Gateway API HTTPRoute rule with matches, filters, and backend references.

matches.description: HTTP match conditions for a route rule.

items.description: HTTP match condition used by an HTTPRoute rule.

type.description: Type value used by this Kubernetes or application setting.

persistence.description: Persistent storage configuration used by the chart.

upload.description: Persistent volume settings for uploaded files and attachments.

enabled.description: Enable or disable this feature or generated resource.

storageClassName.description: StorageClass name. Leave empty to use the cluster default.

existingClaim.description: Existing PersistentVolumeClaim name to reuse instead of creating a new PVC.

postgres.description: Bundled PostgreSQL database used by Firefly III.

enabled.description: Whether to deploy the bundled PostgreSQL database.

port.description: Port number or named port used by this setting.

auth.description: Database and username settings for the bundled PostgreSQL instance.

enabled.description: Enable or disable this feature or generated resource.

storageClassName.description: StorageClass name. Leave empty to use the cluster default.

existingClaim.description: Existing PersistentVolumeClaim name to reuse instead of creating a new PVC.

resources.description: CPU and memory requests and limits.

cronjob.description: CronJob configuration for periodic application maintenance tasks.

enabled.description: Whether to create the maintenance CronJob.

schedule.description: Cron schedule used by the maintenance CronJob.

successfulJobsHistoryLimit.description: Number of successful CronJob runs to retain.

failedJobsHistoryLimit.description: Number of failed CronJob runs to retain.

resources.description: CPU and memory requests and limits.

firefly.description: Firefly III application configuration, including env vars, secret handling, probes, scheduling, and pod settings.

env.description: Non-secret Firefly III environment variables rendered into the application pod.

SITE_OWNER.description: Environment variable SITE_OWNER passed to the application container.

DEFAULT_LANGUAGE.description: Environment variable DEFAULT_LANGUAGE passed to the application container.

DEFAULT_LOCALE.description: Environment variable DEFAULT_LOCALE passed to the application container.

TZ.description: Timezone used by the application container.

TRUSTED_PROXIES.description: Environment variable TRUSTED_PROXIES passed to the application container.

LOG_CHANNEL.description: Environment variable LOG_CHANNEL passed to the application container.

APP_LOG_LEVEL.description: Environment variable APP_LOG_LEVEL passed to the application container.

AUDIT_LOG_LEVEL.description: Environment variable AUDIT_LOG_LEVEL passed to the application container.

AUDIT_LOG_CHANNEL.description: Environment variable AUDIT_LOG_CHANNEL passed to the application container.

PAPERTRAIL_HOST.description: Environment variable PAPERTRAIL_HOST passed to the application container.

PAPERTRAIL_PORT.description: Environment variable PAPERTRAIL_PORT passed to the application container.

DB_SOCKET.description: Environment variable DB_SOCKET passed to the application container.

PGSQL_SSL_MODE.description: Environment variable PGSQL_SSL_MODE passed to the application container.

PGSQL_SSL_ROOT_CERT.description: Environment variable PGSQL_SSL_ROOT_CERT passed to the application container.

PGSQL_SSL_CERT.description: Environment variable PGSQL_SSL_CERT passed to the application container.

PGSQL_SSL_KEY.description: Environment variable PGSQL_SSL_KEY passed to the application container.

PGSQL_SSL_CRL_FILE.description: Environment variable PGSQL_SSL_CRL_FILE passed to the application container.

PGSQL_SCHEMA.description: Environment variable PGSQL_SCHEMA passed to the application container.

CACHE_DRIVER.description: Environment variable CACHE_DRIVER passed to the application container.

SESSION_DRIVER.description: Environment variable SESSION_DRIVER passed to the application container.

REDIS_SCHEME.description: Environment variable REDIS_SCHEME passed to the application container.

REDIS_PATH.description: Environment variable REDIS_PATH passed to the application container.

REDIS_HOST.description: Environment variable REDIS_HOST passed to the application container.

REDIS_PORT.description: Environment variable REDIS_PORT passed to the application container.

REDIS_USERNAME.description: Environment variable REDIS_USERNAME passed to the application container.

REDIS_DB.description: Environment variable REDIS_DB passed to the application container.

REDIS_CACHE_DB.description: Environment variable REDIS_CACHE_DB passed to the application container.

COOKIE_PATH.description: Environment variable COOKIE_PATH passed to the application container.

COOKIE_DOMAIN.description: Environment variable COOKIE_DOMAIN passed to the application container.

COOKIE_SECURE.description: Environment variable COOKIE_SECURE passed to the application container.

COOKIE_SAMESITE.description: Environment variable COOKIE_SAMESITE passed to the application container.

MAIL_ENCRYPTION.description: Environment variable MAIL_ENCRYPTION passed to the application container.

MAIL_SENDMAIL_COMMAND.description: Environment variable MAIL_SENDMAIL_COMMAND passed to the application container.

MAIL_ALLOW_SELF_SIGNED.description: Environment variable MAIL_ALLOW_SELF_SIGNED passed to the application container.

MAIL_VERIFY_PEER.description: Environment variable MAIL_VERIFY_PEER passed to the application container.

MAIL_VERIFY_PEER_NAME.description: Environment variable MAIL_VERIFY_PEER_NAME passed to the application container.

MAILGUN_DOMAIN.description: Environment variable MAILGUN_DOMAIN passed to the application container.

MAILGUN_ENDPOINT.description: Environment variable MAILGUN_ENDPOINT passed to the application container.

SEND_ERROR_MESSAGE.description: Environment variable SEND_ERROR_MESSAGE passed to the application container.

MAP_DEFAULT_LAT.description: Environment variable MAP_DEFAULT_LAT passed to the application container.

MAP_DEFAULT_LONG.description: Environment variable MAP_DEFAULT_LONG passed to the application container.

MAP_DEFAULT_ZOOM.description: Environment variable MAP_DEFAULT_ZOOM passed to the application container.

AUTHENTICATION_GUARD.description: Environment variable AUTHENTICATION_GUARD passed to the application container.

AUTHENTICATION_GUARD_HEADER.description: Environment variable AUTHENTICATION_GUARD_HEADER passed to the application container.

AUTHENTICATION_GUARD_EMAIL.description: Environment variable AUTHENTICATION_GUARD_EMAIL passed to the application container.

PASSPORT_PUBLIC_KEY.description: Environment variable PASSPORT_PUBLIC_KEY passed to the application container.

CUSTOM_LOGOUT_URL.description: Environment variable CUSTOM_LOGOUT_URL passed to the application container.

DISABLE_FRAME_HEADER.description: Environment variable DISABLE_FRAME_HEADER passed to the application container.

DISABLE_CSP_HEADER.description: Environment variable DISABLE_CSP_HEADER passed to the application container.

TRACKER_SITE_ID.description: Environment variable TRACKER_SITE_ID passed to the application container.

TRACKER_URL.description: Environment variable TRACKER_URL passed to the application container.

DKR_CHECK_SQLITE.description: Environment variable DKR_CHECK_SQLITE passed to the application container.

APP_NAME.description: Display name used by the application.

BROADCAST_DRIVER.description: Environment variable BROADCAST_DRIVER passed to the application container.

QUEUE_DRIVER.description: Environment variable QUEUE_DRIVER passed to the application container.

CACHE_PREFIX.description: Environment variable CACHE_PREFIX passed to the application container.

PUSHER_KEY.description: Environment variable PUSHER_KEY passed to the application container.

PUSHER_ID.description: Environment variable PUSHER_ID passed to the application container.

DEMO_USERNAME.description: Environment variable DEMO_USERNAME passed to the application container.

DEMO_PASSWORD.description: Environment variable DEMO_PASSWORD passed to the application container.

FIREFLY_III_LAYOUT.description: Environment variable FIREFLY_III_LAYOUT passed to the application container.

APP_URL.description: Public URL used when the application generates links and redirects.

secrets.description: Secret management for required Firefly III values such as APP_KEY, DB_PASSWORD, and STATIC_CRON_TOKEN.

existingSecret.description: Existing Secret containing Firefly III secret values. Recommended for production deployments.

rolloutToken.description: Arbitrary value used to trigger Firefly III pod rollouts when an externally managed Secret changes.

inline.description: Inline Firefly III secret values for local testing. Prefer existingSecret for production.

APP_KEY.description: Laravel application encryption key. Generate a unique value for each deployment.

STATIC_CRON_TOKEN.description: Inline secret value for STATIC_CRON_TOKEN. Prefer an existing Kubernetes Secret for production.

REDIS_PASSWORD.description: Inline secret value for REDIS_PASSWORD. Prefer an existing Kubernetes Secret for production.

MAILGUN_SECRET.description: Inline secret value for MAILGUN_SECRET. Prefer an existing Kubernetes Secret for production.

MANDRILL_SECRET.description: Inline secret value for MANDRILL_SECRET. Prefer an existing Kubernetes Secret for production.

SPARKPOST_SECRET.description: Inline secret value for SPARKPOST_SECRET. Prefer an existing Kubernetes Secret for production.

MAILERSEND_API_KEY.description: Inline secret value for MAILERSEND_API_KEY. Prefer an existing Kubernetes Secret for production.

PASSPORT_PRIVATE_KEY.description: Inline secret value for PASSPORT_PRIVATE_KEY. Prefer an existing Kubernetes Secret for production.

IPINFO_TOKEN.description: Inline secret value for IPINFO_TOKEN. Prefer an existing Kubernetes Secret for production.

PUSHER_SECRET.description: Inline secret value for PUSHER_SECRET. Prefer an existing Kubernetes Secret for production.

resources.description: CPU and memory requests and limits.

port.description: Port number or named port used by this setting.

initialDelaySeconds.description: Seconds to wait after container start before the probe first runs.

periodSeconds.description: How often, in seconds, Kubernetes runs the probe.

timeoutSeconds.description: Seconds after which the probe attempt times out.

failureThreshold.description: Number of failed probe attempts before Kubernetes marks the container unhealthy or unready.

failureThreshold.description: Number of failed probe attempts before Kubernetes marks the container unhealthy or unready.
